nationalWithdrawals.description_hu: A Momentum kuldottgyulesen dontott: nem indit onallo listat a 2026-os valasztason. Teljes visszalepes, nem csak korzetekben. A TISZA gyozelme erdekeben hozott dontes.
nationalWithdrawals.description_en: Momentum decided at its delegates' meeting not to run in the 2026 election at all. Full withdrawal, not just in districts. Decision made in the interest of a TISZA victory.

nationalWithdrawals.description_hu: Az MSZP kongresszusa ugy dontott, hogy a part nem indul a 2026-os valasztason. Nem allit orszagos listat es nem indit sajat jelolteket partszinekben. Minden korzetben a legerosebb ellenzeki jeloltet tamogatjak. Kivetel: 4 volt MSZP-s politikus fuggetlenkent indul (Kunhalmi Agnes, Vajda Zoltan, Hiller Istvan, Szabo Sandor).
nationalWithdrawals.description_en: The MSZP congress decided not to run in the 2026 election. No national list, no candidates under party banner. They support the strongest opposition candidate in every district. Exception: 4 former MSZP politicians run as independents (Kunhalmi Agnes, Vajda Zoltan, Hiller Istvan, Szabo Sandor).

nationalWithdrawals.description_hu: Marki-Zay Peter bejelentette, hogy partja, a Mindenki Magyarorszaga Neppart nem indit onallo listat 2026-ban. A dontes politikai gesztus a Tisza Part javara.
nationalWithdrawals.description_en: Marki-Zay Peter announced that his party, MMN, will not run an independent list in 2026. The decision is a political gesture in favour of the Tisza Party.

districtWithdrawals.reason_hu: Valasztoi a kormanyvaltasert szavaztak ra, es ezt a dontesevel tudja a legjobban szolgalni.
districtWithdrawals.reason_en: His voters voted for government change, and he can best serve that goal with this decision.

districtWithdrawals.reason_hu: Dobrev Klara leptette vissza a kielezett verseny miatt a kormanyvaltasi eselyek maximalizalasa erdekeben.
districtWithdrawals.reason_en: Dobrev Klara withdrew him due to the tight race, to maximise government change chances.

districtWithdrawals.reason_hu: A TISZA jelolt a legerosebb kihivo, a DK partdontessel leptette vissza jeloltjet.
districtWithdrawals.reason_en: The TISZA candidate is the strongest challenger; DK withdrew their candidate by party decision.

districtWithdrawals.reason_hu: Az igazi kihivoja a Fidesznek a Tisza, es nem erdemes vele szembe menni.
districtWithdrawals.reason_en: The real challenger to Fidesz is Tisza, and it's not worth running against them.

districtWithdrawals.reason_hu: Sajat dontesbol lepett vissza a kormanyvaltasert. Kovetkezmenye: kizartak a DK-bol.
districtWithdrawals.reason_en: Stepped down by own decision for government change. Consequence: expelled from DK.

districtWithdrawals.reason_hu: A kozgazdaszprofesszor kifejezetten a Tisza Part javara lepett vissza, mondvan a szavazatok megosztasa a kormanynak kedvezne.
districtWithdrawals.reason_en: The economics professor explicitly stepped down in favour of Tisza, saying vote splitting would benefit the government.

districtWithdrawals.reason_hu: Az eselyek maximalizalasa miatt lepett vissza a Tisza javara.
districtWithdrawals.reason_en: Stepped down to maximise chances for Tisza.

notableNonWithdrawals.reason_hu: A DK szerint ebben a korzetben ok az erosebbek, nem a TISZA. Inkabb a TISZA-t kerik visszalepesre.
notableNonWithdrawals.reason_en: DK believes they are stronger in this district, not TISZA. They ask TISZA to step down instead.

notableNonWithdrawals.reason_hu: Jakab Peter DK-s szinekben indul, a DK szerint o a legerosebb kihivo ebben a korzetben.
notableNonWithdrawals.reason_en: Jakab Peter runs under DK banner; DK considers him the strongest challenger in this district.

notableNonWithdrawals.reason_hu: Hadhazy Akos fuggetlen jeloltkent versenyben van a TISZA jeloltjevel is — itt nem egyertelmu, ki az erosebb ellenzeki.
notableNonWithdrawals.reason_en: Hadhazy Akos competes as independent even with the TISZA candidate — it's unclear who is the stronger opposition figure here.

partyStrategies.summary_hu: Reszleges taktikai visszalepesek. Partdontessel 3 korzetbol leptek vissza (BP-06, BP-08, Nograd-01). Kopping Rita sajat dontese miatt kizartak. Tobb korzetben maradnak, ahol szerintuk ok az erosebbek.
partyStrategies.summary_en: Partial tactical withdrawals. Withdrew from 3 districts by party decision (BP-06, BP-08, Nograd-01). Kopping Rita expelled for independent withdrawal. Stay in several districts where they believe they are stronger.

partyStrategies.summary_hu: Teljes kiszallas. Nem indul a 2026-os valasztason sem listaval, sem egyeni jeloltekkel. A TISZA gyozelme erdekeben hozott dontes.
partyStrategies.summary_en: Full withdrawal. Not running in 2026 with either a list or individual candidates. Decision made for TISZA's victory.

partyStrategies.summary_hu: Nem indul partszinekben. Kongresszusi dontes: nincs orszagos lista, nincs sajat jelolt. Minden korzetben a legerosebb ellenzeki jeloltet tamogatjak. Kivetel: 4 volt MSZP-s fuggetlenkent indul.
partyStrategies.summary_en: Not running under party banner. Congress decision: no national list, no own candidates. Support strongest opposition candidate in every district. Exception: 4 former MSZP members run as independents.

partyStrategies.summary_hu: Mindenhol indul. Nem varhato koordinacio vagy visszalepes. Sajat erovel kuzd minden korzetben.
partyStrategies.summary_en: Running everywhere. No coordination or withdrawal expected. Fighting in every district with their own strength.

partyStrategies.summary_hu: Indul, nem lep vissza. Sajat protest-szerep, nem akar koordinaciot. Helyenkent spoilerhatas lehetseges.
partyStrategies.summary_en: Running, not withdrawing. Own protest role, no coordination. Possible spoiler effect in some districts.

partyStrategies.summary_hu: Nem tudott orszagos listat allitani, 48 egyeni jelolttel indul. Huszonot ev utan eloszor nem lesz a szavazolapon a Jobbik logoja.
partyStrategies.summary_en: Failed to field a national list, running with 48 individual candidates. For the first time in 20 years, the Jobbik logo will not appear on the ballot.

mszpIndependents.note_en: Former MSZP co-chair, running as independent
Former MSZP chairman, running as independent

mszpIndependents.note_hu: MSZP-hez kotheto, fuggetlenkent indul, helyi beagyazottsag
mszpIndependents.note_en: MSZP-linked, running as independent, strong local presence

oevkEstimate.note_hu: Nyilvanos modellek tobbsege TISZA-tobbseget vetit elore. Fo toresvonal: Budapest es nagyvarosok inkabb TISZA, falvak es keleti/deli korzetekben inkabb Fidesz. Az atrajzolt korzetok a Fidesz tulelesi eselyeit javitjak.
oevkEstimate.note_en: Most public models project a TISZA majority. Main divide: Budapest and large cities lean TISZA, villages and eastern/southern districts lean Fidesz. Redistricted constituencies improve Fidesz survival chances.
